overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval rural village with thatched-roof houses and wooden palisades. The character passes through gates, encounters villagers including a running child, and traverses dirt paths before entering a dark wooden tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entry path between thatched farmhouses

events.description: passing through wooden archway gate into the village interior

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path between wooden thatched houses

entered.detail: wooden cottage with straw thatched roof and log walls
tall pointed wooden stakes forming a defensive fence
arched wooden entrance structure with heavy beams

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path toward a wooden village gate, passing traditional thatched-roof farmhouses. The morning sun casts long shadows across the trail as he approaches and passes through the arched wooden entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: village main street with scattered residents

events.description: child runs across the path from right to left in front of Geralt

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the village center at a steady pace

notable_agents.action: child in blue tunic running playfully across the dirt road

entered.detail: wooden wagon with large wheels parked beside the path
cluster of thatched-roof buildings in the village center

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the settlement, Geralt passes a wooden cart and encounters a child running across the path. The village opens up to reveal more thatched houses ahead while the initial gate recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: village market area with craft stalls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past villagers gathered near wooden market structures

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on wooden bench working on a craft
group of villagers conversing near a market stall

entered.detail: large stone cliff formation rising behind the village buildings
wooden market stall with goods displayed on counters
rustic wooden seating along the path

segments.scene_description: The path leads through a busier village section where residents gather near market stalls. A large rock outcrop looms behind the houses on the right as Geralt passes villagers engaged in daily activities.

events.description: entering dark wooden tunnel structure, sunlight fades to shadow
approaching bright exit at the end of the covered gate

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the dark wooden tunnel toward the exit

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair in blue dress walking ahead through the gate

entered.detail: tall dark wooden gate structure forming a covered tunnel with arched exit

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a dark wooden tunnel gate where the lighting shifts dramatically to shadow. He follows a red-haired woman toward the bright exit at the far end of the covered passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit rural approach into the shadowed depths of a village tunnel. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path lined with thatched-roof farmhouses, moving steadily toward and through an arched wooden gate. As he enters the settlement, the view opens up to reveal a wooden cart and a child running across the path before shifting toward a busier village center filled with market stalls and a looming rock outcrop. The scene then transitions from the bright morning light of the residential area into a dark wooden tunnel gate, where the environment plunges into deep shadow. Finally, the camera follows a red-haired woman through the covered passage toward a bright exit at the far end.
